title: Lekebaby Building Bricks, Classic 1200 Pieces Building Blocks Refill Packs Compatible with All Major Brands(No Baseplates Included), Gifts Presents for Boys Girls 6 Years Old and Up
features: Lekebaby 1200 Pcs Building Bricks: Features a wide range of blocks in shapes and colors and weights about 1.05 kg in one package, the toy building sets are larger than most building bricks in the markets. Please note small variation in color types and sizes may happen because of the machine selection
Compatible With All Major Brands: Lekebaby classic building bricks play nicely with other toys and be compatible with all major brands

Great Stem Educational Toys: This big building blocks can greatly increase kids' hands-on ability, divergent thinking ability and logical thinking ability, also inspire hours of imaginative thinking from the building games
Kids-Friendly Material: The ABS material used for these building blocks is non-toxic and lead/BPA/phthalate free, no burrs, no odor, easy to wash to keep germs away,safety for your children's health

Customer Care Commitment:Our Lekebaby classic building brick set is supported by a dedication to customer care. We are prepared to assist you with any questions or concerns you may have regarding your purchase
description: Product Description Are you struggling to find a toy that is both educational and entertaining for your toddler? Lekebaby Generic Building Bricks designed for toddlers are colorful structures that can be combined or stacked together in a variety of ways. There are numerous sizes and shapes your little one would like to play with. Specifcations for Lekebaby Large Building Blocks Kit Package included: *1200 pieces building blocks *1 stacking instruction *1 color box, measured 26 x 7 x 26 cm *Weight: 1.05 kg Please note: Small variation in color types and sizes may happen. Creative Toys for Kids Not only can the building kits help keep your little one busy, but they can also have many developmental benefits. Bright colors grab kids’ attention and bring models to life. Each bricks will take your little one on a new adventure! Smooth edges without any burrs, the building toy is safe to kids. Lekebaby Classic Building Bricks Box for Kids - Large and Creative Compatible with All Major Brands This stickle bricks is made of the premium quality lead-free material, with smooth edges for kids' safety, this building bricks play set is compatible with all leading brands. It is the ideal bricks building set for play at home, kindergartens or schools. Variety Beatiful Colors and Shapes Kinds of different colors make it possibility to build different scales or projects, giving children a great visual experience, and improving children's recognition and matching ability of colors. Contains various shapes, besides the regular shapes, our set has the different beautiful flower shape. Great Preschool Learning Toy Lekebaby 1200 PCS classic building bricks will excise kids hands-on ability, develop their space recognition ability. During the building games, it will also encourage endless imagination and creativity. Lekebaby Brightly Colored Building Bricks Inspires and encourages free building. Allows imaginations to run wild.
